channel.title: Threat Modeling on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Threat Modeling on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Engagement Management
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Engagement Management" , "Scoping" , "Reporting" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Threat Modeling" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master engagement management for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn pre-engagement activities, agreement types, the shared responsibility model, testing frameworks, threat modeling, and reporting.

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005): Governance, Risk, and Compliance
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "Governance Risk Compliance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Threat Modeling" , "Security Governance" , "CASP+" , "Enterprise Security" , "AI Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master governance, risk, and compliance for the CompTIA SecurityX CAS-005 exam. Learn security program documentation, risk management, third-party risk, compliance frameworks, threat modeling, and AI security.
